series_metadata.series_description: Detailed information about each training school conducted to ensure that the schools are meeting training requirements and as proof of student attendance. Files include, but are not limited to, the application to conduct a school, list of instructors, calendar (dates, topics and instructors), student enrollment list, attendance roster, student evaluation, audit sheets used to verify minimum criteria met, inspection reports, testing requests, student exams, medical extensions, student enrollment documents and violation notices.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from close of school ; Paper: from close of school, or documents and/or data saved electronically
